blended.narrative: Teton Pass Ski Area is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,543 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days. Strong winds with gusts to 43 mph may cause lift holds.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.5" of snow, highs of 36°F, gusts to 43 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 3.9" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 8" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: light drizzle, highs of 52°F, gusts to 54 mph.
Wednesday: overcast, highs of 58°F, gusts to 52 mph.

recent_conditions.narrative: 4.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 27".
